title: Motorola MOSCAD SCADA telemetry
short description: Motorola MOSCAD, is motorola's FSK version of SCADA for Data acquisition.
description:
#REDIRECT [Supervisory Control And Data Acquisition (SCADA)](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/Supervisory_Control_And_Data_Acquisition_%28SCADA%29)

As there are about a zillion forms of SCADA, existing either as short AFSK bursts, to PSK and the latter, this is also an example of Motorola's way of doing SCADA.
